prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次分别为约20081→20499→17028→22336→36486名，2025年因河南省首年新高考改革，物理类位次大幅后移约14150名，波动剧烈；2025年基准位次约36486名；该校在河南省理科/物理类招生计划：2021–2023年均为128人，2024年增至142人，2025年147人，2026年大幅扩招至189人，较2025年增加42人（+28.6%），扩招幅度显著，理论上使竞争略有缓和。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华北电力大学（保定）为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年约第75–84名（2026年约第84名），属中上水平理工类院校，在电力行业具有突出地位；该校近年声誉平稳，未出现明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音综合热度排名未进入前100，关注度一般，未出现异常报考信号；电气工程学科评估A（全国前列），动力工程及工程热物理A-，均为电力行业核心学科；招生专业中电气工程及其自动化、能源与动力工程等与优势学科高度对应，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化专业在2024年专业热度分析中被评为“高热推荐”，社会关注度持续走高；河南省2026年普通高考考生总数约120万人（较2025年约90.7万增加约32%），考生规模大幅增长，竞争加剧；该校位于河北省保定市，非本省高校；在河南省招生占比约6.6%（2025年），属中等偏上水平，无特殊地域偏好信号。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年新高考改革后位次大幅后移的基准、2026年招生计划大幅扩招28.6%的缓和作用、以及河南省考生总数大幅增长约32%带来的竞争加剧，三者相互对冲；预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年36486名基础上，因扩招效应使位次后移约6254名至42740名附近，再考虑考生增加及电气专业高热等因素小幅回调约200名；预测最低位次约42540名，区间42040–43040名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics) were approximately 20081 → 20499 → 17028 → 22336 → 36486, respectively. In 2025, due to Henan Province's first year of the new college entrance examination reform, the physics ranking significantly dropped by about 14150 places, with high volatility; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 36486. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics in Henan Province: 128 students each year from 2021 to 2023, increased to 142 in 2024, 147 in 2025, and a substantial expansion to 189 in 2026, an increase of 42 students (+28.6%) compared to 2025, which theoretically eases competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: North China Electric Power University (Baoding) is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has been around 75–84 in recent years (approximately 84th in 2026), placing it as a mid-to-upper level science and engineering institution with a prominent position in the electric power industry. The university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps; its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is not in the top 100, indicating average attention and no abnormal application signals. The electrical engineering discipline is rated A (top in the country), and power engineering and engineering thermophysics are rated A-, both core disciplines in the electric power industry. Majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Energy and Power Engineering, etc., closely correspond to its advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Electrical Engineering and Automation major was rated as 'highly popular and recommended' in the 2024 major popularity analysis, with continuously high social attention. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Henan Province is approximately 1.2 million (an increase of about 32% from approximately 907,000 in 2025), leading to a significant increase in candidate numbers and intensified competition. The university is located in Baoding City, Hebei Province, not a local university in Henan; its enrollment proportion in Henan Province is about 6.6% (2025), which is moderately high, with no special regional preference signals.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline of the significant ranking drop after the 2025 new college entrance examination reform, the mitigating effect of the substantial 28.6% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the intensified competition due to the approximately 32% increase in the total number of candidates in Henan Province, these factors offset each other. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for physics in 2026 will shift from the 2025 baseline of 36486, moving back by about 6254 places to around 42740 due to the expansion effect, and then slightly adjust upward by about 200 places due to the increase in candidates and the high popularity of electrical engineering. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 42540, with a range of 42040–43040.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 42040–43040, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 flagship majors (Electrical Engineering and Automation) as reach targets, and Tier 3 majors as safe backups. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<42040), focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (>43040), it is advisable to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as backups.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 5241 → 4713 → 4867 → 5068 → 5311, with a narrow fluctuation range of 4700–5300 in the past 5 years. The 2025 baseline is about 5311, showing a stable but slightly backward trend. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Henan Province: 17 students from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 16 in 2024, significantly reduced to 11 in 2025, and maintained at 11 in 2026, unchanged from 2025. The recent continuous reduction and stabilization of the plan has a neutral impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: North China Electric Power University (Baoding) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking is approximately 75–84 in recent years, placing it at an upper-middle level among science and engineering institutions. Liberal arts majors are not its traditional strengths. The university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps. Its comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin has not entered the top 100, indicating average attention. Its advantageous disciplines are concentrated in Electrical Engineering (A) and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics (A-), both in science and engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The law major has high social popularity (recommended), while foreign language and literature majors have average popularity and are to be observed. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Henan Province is about 1.2 million (an increase of about 32% from approximately 907,000 in 2025). History category candidates, estimated at about 39% of the total in recent years, are about 468,000, an increase of about 33% from 352,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. The university is located in Baoding City, Hebei Province, not a local university in Henan. The number of liberal arts admissions in Henan is small (11 students), with no special regional preference signal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the narrow fluctuation of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, and the significant increase of about 33% in history category candidates in Henan Province, intensified competition will push the ranking slightly backward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 5341, with a range of 4841–5841.
